articles.author: NAOMI CANTON
articles.title: Pakistan and Bangladesh migrants are faking they are gay to get asylum in the UK: Report - The Times of India
articles.description: South Asia News: LONDON: A shady network of immigration advisers in the UK is charging migrants from Pakistan and Bangladesh thousands of pounds to pretend they are ga.
